message:
feat(submodules): add submodule support for worktrees and refinery merge queue (#1237)

Three layers of submodule support:

1. Auto-init submodules after Clone and WorktreeAdd operations (no-op
   for repos without submodules)
2. Detect submodule pointer changes between refs via git diff --raw
3. Refinery pushes submodule commits before squash merge to prevent
   dangling references on main

Fixes applied during merge:
- Replaced hand-rolled .gitmodules INI parser with git config -f to
  handle arbitrary field ordering correctly
- submoduleDefaultBranch now tries local refs before network calls
- Fixed test that hardcoded "main" branch name

Based on PR #1237 by Joshua Vial (joshuavial).

Co-Authored-By: Joshua Vial <joshuavial@gmail.com>
